Dashboard mockups · 4 Gemini + 4 Anthropic Console

All eight show the same panels as the live dashboard (Top-3, Today's Leads, Hire Watch, Prediction Signals, BD Calendar, Candidate Watch, Tools, Recent Reports). Eight different visual languages so you can pick the AI-product feel you want — none look CRM-y.
Gemini family · pale-blue halo · Inter · pulse-green live dot

C1 · The Morning Note — pure editorial, zero chrome

A typeset private briefing: Fable writes the page like a desk analyst. Each lead is a headline, one evidenced paragraph, the opening as a pull-quote, and a single facts line (call · window · fragile if). Hover an entry and the sources appear as margin sidenotes. No chips, no scores, no panels — the information is the interface.
Open mockup →

C2 · Concierge — the AI is the interface

Fable greets the AD by name with the three calls worth their hour, each as two evidenced sentences plus the verbatim opening and quiet text actions. A single prompt bar replaces all navigation: ask why Aviva is waiting, draft the Lloyds email, interrogate the kills.
Open mockup →

C3 · The Field — the whole book as a strategy map

Every account positioned on two axes that matter: window closing × readiness to pay. Dot size is strength; hollow dots are still being worked by Fable; the green call-zone makes the morning obvious at a glance. Click any dot and its full prose case fills the right column.
Open mockup →

C4 · The Horizon — time is the organising principle

Every lead placed on the day its window closes, today marked in blue. Urgency is geometry: what's nearest expires first, dim dots are waking later or unverified. The most time-critical lead's opening floats beneath the line, ready to use.
Open mockup →

C5 · Six Lines — typographic zen

The day reduced to six serif sentences, each one a complete thought about a company. The selected line holds full opacity and unfolds its case, quote and facts beneath; the rest wait dimmed. Arrow keys walk the list. Nothing else on the page at all.
Open mockup →

B4 · Expanding Board — minimalist rows that unfold in place ★ RECOMMENDED

The whole board on one filled page over the live site's halo background: slim one-line rows (rank · company · seat · driver · qualification micro-ticks · window · score ring). Click any row and it expands inline into the complete portfolio — red-teamed opening, scorecard with evidence, business case + dated timeline, buyer + propensity, kill-test, actions — while the rest of the board stays in view. Accordion + ↑↓ keys; Developing rows expand to their why-not + /investigate.
Open mockup →

B1 · Callsheet — split-pane command surface for the calling AD

Ranked rail of today's call-ready leads; selecting one opens the full BD portfolio: the warm opening to say verbatim, the Seat/Budget/Urgency/Buyer scorecard, the red-teamed business case with dated evidence timeline, economic buyer + champion path, kill-test and one-click work products. Keyboard-first (↑↓/F/X).
Open mockup →

B2 · Daily Run — one lead at a time, built for the dialling flow

A focus deck: progress segments across the top, one giant card per lead — company, opening line in serif, qualification ticks, strength + conviction dials, strongest fact / who signs / what kills it. Arrow through the run; F/X triage without leaving the keyboard. Zero chrome, maximum conviction.
Open mockup →

B3 · Portfolio Bento — the at-a-glance morning board

Hero tile for №1 with its opening; flip-tiles for the rest of the call-ready set (hover flips to the case + buyer route); right rail with the Developing queue and the fee-propensity mix; a Fable strip reporting overnight red-team verdicts, average conviction and claims verified.
Open mockup →
G1 · Halo Hero

Halo hero with AI greeting + Top-3 cards floating on the glow

Full Gemini halo as a hero band with one-sentence greeting and the Top-3 floating on it. AI-suggestion chips below. Each panel carries a small AI commentary line.
Open mockup →
G2 · Workspace

Gemini-app sidebar with Ask-anything prompt + halo backdrop

Left sidebar with workspace/history (Gemini-app style). Prompt bar across the top of the main column. Halo gradient bleeds down behind the greeting. "Hi Sara" with the rainbow-gradient brand word.
Open mockup →
G3 · Compact Pro

Information-dense Gemini for a pro who works the dashboard daily

Tighter spacing, 3-column main grid, halo only behind the Top-3. Topbar carries the live counts. Tools become pill-buttons rather than tiles. More data per screen, fewer scrolls.
Open mockup →
G4 · Bento Halo

12-col asymmetric bento with halo behind the Top-3 hero card

Apple-product-page bento with the Top-3 taking an 8×2 halo-backed hero, two coloured gradient stat tiles beside it, signal panels in equal-sized cards below.
Open mockup →
Anthropic Console family · warm cream · Newsreader serif accents · clay coral accent
A1 · Editorial Brief

Document-style brief reading like an AI-written report

Single-column reading layout. The top-3 actions are written as paragraphs — "NatWest needs you first…" — with inline action buttons. Serif headlines, italic-coloured signal lines.
Open mockup →
A2 · Console Pro

console.anthropic.com restraint applied end-to-end

Clean cream-white base. Big 5-column stat strip up top, then a 3-card Top-3, then panels in 2-col + full-width arrangement. Generous whitespace, refined Inter typography, clay accent only where it earns it.
Open mockup →
A3 · Workspace Triple

Three-pane workspace with AI assistant on the right

Thin nav rail (200px) · main panels in the centre · right-side AI inspector pane (300px) with serif insight cards, pulse indicator, and suggested-question chips. Always-visible AI commentary on whatever's in view.
Open mockup →
A4 · Insight Cards

Cream bento with serif headlines like an AI research publication

12-col asymmetric grid. Top-3 in a wide hero with a Newsreader-serif greeting and italic-accented brief. Two warm gradient stat tiles. Signal panels with Newsreader headers. Feels like reading an AI-written research dashboard.
Open mockup →
